name: Suzhou Harmontronics Automation Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Suzhou Harmontronics Automation Technology Co., Ltd engages in the research, development, design, manufacture, sale, and after-sale service of automatic equipment in China and internationally. It provides standard equipment, such as PCB press-inserting machines, chemical-integrated machines, and lamination molding machines; and develops manufacturing software. The company serves customers in automotive electronics, health care, new energy battery, and other industries. Suzhou Harmontronics Automation Technology Co., Ltd was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.
